heading: Reservation of funds; grants to eligible agencies; allotments
label: 3291 Reservation of funds; grants to eligible agencies; allotments
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first full program year after (), see , set out as a note under .July 22, 2014July 1, 2015section 506 of Pub. L. 113–128section 3101 of this title

children.text: shall reserve 2 percent to carry out , except that the amount so reserved shall not exceed $15,000,000; andsection 3332 of this title
shall reserve 12 percent of the amount that remains after reserving funds under paragraph (1) to carry out .section 3333 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: From the sum appropriated under and not reserved under subsection (a) for a fiscal year, the Secretary shall award a grant to each eligible agency having a unified State plan approved under or a combined State plan approved under in an amount equal to the sum of the initial allotment under subsection (c)(1) and the additional allotment under subsection (c)(2) for the eligible agency for the fiscal year, subject to subsections (f) and (g), to enable the eligible agency to carry out the activities assisted under this subchapter.section 3275 of this titlesection 3112 of this titlesection 3113 of this title

children.heading: Purpose of grants
children.label: 2 Purpose of grants
children.text: The Secretary may award a grant under paragraph (1) only if the eligible entity involved agrees to expend the grant for adult education and literacy activities in accordance with the provisions of this subchapter.

children.label: A
children.text: $100,000, in the case of an eligible agency serving an outlying area; and

children.label: B
children.text: $250,000, in the case of any other eligible agency.

children.heading: Additional allotments
children.label: 2 Additional allotments
children.text: From the sum appropriated under , not reserved under subsection (a), and not allotted under paragraph (1), for a fiscal year, the Secretary shall allot to each eligible agency that receives an initial allotment under paragraph (1) an additional amount that bears the same relationship to such sum as the number of qualifying adults in the State or outlying area served by the eligible agency bears to the number of such adults in all States and outlying areas.section 3275 of this title
is at least 16 years of age;
is beyond the age of compulsory school attendance under the law of the State or outlying area;
does not have a secondary school diploma or its recognized equivalent; and
is not enrolled in secondary school.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: From amounts made available under subsection (c) for the Republic of Palau, the Secretary shall award grants to Guam, American Samoa, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, or the Republic of Palau to carry out activities described in this subchapter in accordance with the provisions of this subchapter, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Award basis
children.label: 2 Award basis
children.text: The Secretary shall award grants pursuant to paragraph (1) on a competitive basis and pursuant to the recommendations from the Pacific Region Educational Laboratory in Honolulu, Hawaii.

children.heading: Termination of eligibility
children.label: 3 Termination of eligibility
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Republic of Palau shall be eligible to receive a grant under this subchapter except during the period described in .section 3102(45) of this title

children.heading: Administrative costs
children.label: 4 Administrative costs
children.text: The Secretary may provide not more than 5 percent of the funds made available for grants under this subsection to pay the administrative costs of the Pacific Region Educational Laboratory regarding activities assisted under this subsection.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (c), for fiscal year 2015 and each succeeding fiscal year, no eligible agency shall receive an allotment under this section that is less than 90 percent of the allotment the eligible agency received for the preceding fiscal year under this section.

children.heading: Ratable reduction
children.label: 2 Ratable reduction
children.text: If for any fiscal year the amount available for allotment under this subchapter is insufficient to satisfy the provisions of paragraph (1) the Secretary shall ratably reduce the payments to all eligible agencies, as necessary.

children.heading: Reallotment
children.label: g Reallotment
children.text: The portion of any eligible agency’s allotment under this subchapter for a fiscal year that the Secretary determines will not be required for the period such allotment is available for carrying out activities under this subchapter, shall be available for reallotment from time to time, on such dates during such period as the Secretary shall fix, to other eligible agencies in proportion to the original allotments to such agencies under this subchapter for such year.
